nodes.label: UI Kit — Homepage Screenshot
nodes.description: High-fidelity screenshot of the Ratehub.ca homepage showing the sticky navigation bar and hero section with dark blueberry background.

nodes.label: Navigation Bar
nodes.description: Sticky white navigation bar. Left: 'ratehub.ca' wordmark in dark text. Centre: 6 product nav links — Mortgages, Credit cards, Banking, Insurance, Investing, Tools & calculators. Right: language switcher (En / Fr) and 'Sign in' CTA button with rounded pill shape and dark fill.

nodes.label: ratehub.ca Wordmark
nodes.description: Ratehub.ca logotype rendered in dark blackberry text. No icon/symbol — text-only wordmark.

nodes.label: Primary Navigation Links
nodes.description: Six horizontal nav items in sentence case: Mortgages, Credit cards, Banking, Insurance, Investing, Tools & calculators. Rendered in medium-weight sans-serif (Gordita). No underline in default state.

nodes.label: Sign In Button (Nav)
nodes.description: Pill-shaped 'Sign in' button with dark fill (desaturated blueberry ~#2d6e8a) and white label. Sits to the right of the En/Fr language toggle.

nodes.label: Language Switcher (En / Fr)
nodes.description: Compact text toggle showing 'En · Fr' separated by a dot. Allows switching between English and French site versions.

nodes.label: Hero Section
nodes.description: Full-bleed hero section with deep blueberry-darkest background (#0d2d3a range). Contains a large decorative circle/blob shape on the right side in a slightly lighter teal. Left column holds eyebrow pill, H1 headline, descriptor paragraph. Right side holds the decorative brand shape.

nodes.label: Hero Eyebrow Pill — MoneySense Award
nodes.description: Small rounded pill/badge with light background. Contains a trophy emoji icon followed by 'MoneySense — Best Rate Platform 2024' in small body text. Used as social-proof eyebrow above the H1.

nodes.label: Hero H1 Headline
nodes.description: Large display headline: "Canada's smartest way to compare mortgages" in white Gordita Bold. Sentence case. Very large font (~52px desktop). Spans 3 lines. The period after 'mortgages' is styled with the brand cyan dot (.showDot::after CSS pseudo-element).

nodes.label: Hero Descriptor Paragraph
nodes.description: Supporting body copy in white/light text: 'Compare rates from 30+ lenders. Save up to $13,384 over your first 5 years — no obligation, no fees.' Numbers in Canadian format. Sentence case. Medium weight Gordita.

nodes.label: Hero Decorative Brand Shape
nodes.description: Large circular/organic shape in slightly lighter teal/blueberry tone positioned to the right of the hero text. Acts as a background design element from the brand shapes asset library (assets/brand/). No gradient — flat tone on tone.

nodes.label: Hero Progressive Tab Form
nodes.description: 4-tab progressive form component (HeroBannerV2.jsx) — tabs for Mortgages, Credit Cards, Banking, Insurance. Not fully visible in the cropped screenshot but present in the hero layout based on codebase.

nodes.label: Color Token — blueberry-darkest (Hero BG)
nodes.description: The hero section background uses --rh-blueberry-darkest, a very deep navy-teal. The decorative shape uses a slightly lighter shade of the same hue family, maintaining a tone-on-tone feel with no gradient.

nodes.label: Typography — Gordita Typeface
nodes.description: All text across nav and hero uses Gordita. Nav items use weight 500 (medium). Hero H1 uses weight 700 (bold). Descriptor uses weight 400 (regular). Sentence case throughout — no all-caps.

nodes.label: Pill / Badge Component
nodes.description: Reusable Pill primitive (src/components.jsx) used as hero eyebrow. Light neutral background, full border-radius, small padded text. Supports inline icons/emoji.

nodes.label: Ratehub Favicon 32x32
nodes.description: A 32x32 pixel favicon featuring the Ratehub 'r' logomark — a lowercase sans-serif 'r' glyph rendered in white on a solid black circular background. The circle is fully filled black, giving the mark a compact, icon-safe silhouette. The letterform is bold and geometric with a rounded terminal, consistent with the Gordita typeface used in the broader Ratehub brand. This is the tab/browser icon representation of the brand.

nodes.label: Ratehub R Logo 300x300
nodes.description: A 300x300 pixel square logomark for Ratehub featuring the iconic 'r.' brand symbol on a solid black background. The mark consists of two white geometric shapes: (1) a tall vertical rectangle representing the stem of a lowercase 'r', and (2) a filled circle positioned to the upper-right of the stem, referencing both the arc of the letter 'r' and the brand's signature punctuation dot (the 'showDot' cyan period concept rendered here in monochrome). Together these two shapes — a rectangle and a circle — form a minimalist, abstract 'r' that is instantly recognisable. The composition is clean, high-contrast, and works at all sizes. This is the primary square logomark used for app icons, social profiles, and large-format brand placements.

links.note: The 300x300 r_logo is the canonical source asset from which the 32x32 favicon is derived. The r_logo explicitly deconstructs the letterform into a vertical-bar stem plus a floating circle dot — the same two elements compressed into the favicon's circular container.
